name: coding-agent-router-debug-demo
objective: Prepare compact context for the next coding-agent turn while preserving active build failure, user constraints, and the implementation decision.

events.content: Implement the billing router in apps/api/src/billing-router.ts. Use Hono only. Do not add Express. Keep the public response shape exactly { ok, invoiceId, status }. Add the route under /v1/billing/:invoiceId.
I inspected apps/api/src/index.ts and packages/core/src/store.ts. The API already uses Hono and centralizes route registration in apps/api/src/index.ts. There is no Express dependency.

Decision: create a small Hono router module and mount it from apps/api/src/index.ts instead of putting billing logic inline. Preserve the response shape { ok, invoiceId, status } and keep invoice status deterministic for the demo.

npm run typecheck failed

apps/api/src/billing-router.ts:2:22 - error TS2307: Cannot find module './billing-store.js' or its corresponding type declarations.

2 import { lookupInvoice } from './billing-store.js';
                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

apps/api/src/index.ts:17:10 - error TS2305: Module './billing-router.js' has no exported member 'billingRouter'.

17 import { billingRouter } from './billing-router.js';
            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Need to either add apps/api/src/billing-store.ts or inline the lookup in billing-router.ts, and export billingRouter by name.
Next action: fix the missing billing-store import by keeping the invoice lookup local to billing-router.ts, export const billingRouter, then rerun npm run typecheck and npm run test:smoke.

expectedFacts.expected: Use Hono only and do not add Express.
Typecheck failed because billing-store.js is missing and billingRouter is not exported.
Inline/localize invoice lookup, export const billingRouter, rerun typecheck and smoke test.
